category_sources: source_facts.description says ffmpeg-full plays, records, converts, and streams audio and video codecs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ffmpeg-full; display name expands the Homebrew formula id while retaining FFmpeg project naming.
docs_sources: Official FFmpeg site provides a dedicated Documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched; official FFmpeg download page lists https://git.ffmpeg.org/ffmpeg.git as the main FFmpeg Git repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description covers play, record, convert, and stream use cases for audio and video codecs.
source_facts.executables includes command-line FFmpeg tooling such as zmqsend.
